Garlic Rice and Wheat Flour Rolls

Description: These rolls are perfect for a quick and easy snack or meal. They are made with simple ingredients and are deliciously aromatic with garlic.

Ingredients:
- 1 cup of cooked rice
- 1 cup of wheat flour
- 1 tablespoon of minced garlic
- 1/2 teaspoon of salt
- Water as necessary

Instructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the cooked rice, wheat flour, minced garlic, and salt.
2. Mix it all together until a soft dough forms.
3. Add water as necessary to adjust the consistency.
4. Divide the dough into small portions and shape them into rolls.
5. Place the rolls on a greased baking sheet.
6. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
7. Bake the rolls for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
8. Remove them from the oven and let them cool.

One tip: You can add some chopped fresh herbs like parsley or cilantro to the dough for some extra flavor.
which simple dish can I make with only garlic,rice,milk? and list out the description, ingredients, instructions and one tip

Garlic Rice and Milk Soup

Description: This is a creamy rice soup that is infused with garlic flavor. It's a simple and satisfying way to warm up on a chilly day.

Ingredients:
- 1 cup of cooked rice
- 3 cloves of minced garlic
- 2 cups of milk
- Salt and pepper to taste

Instructions:
1. In a pot over medium heat, sauté the minced garlic until fragrant.
2. Add the cooked rice to the pot and stir well.
3. Pour in the milk and stir again.
4. Bring the soup to a simmer.
5. Let it cook for 15-20 minutes, until the rice is tender and the soup has thickened.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Serve hot.

One tip: You can add some grated cheese or chopped herbs like thyme or rosemary to the soup for some extra flavor.

Garlic Rice with Creamy Garlic Sauce

Description: This dish features garlic rice with a creamy garlic sauce for a flavourful and comforting meal.

Ingredients:
- 1 cup of cooked rice
- 3 cloves of minced garlic
- 1/2 cup of heavy cream
- Salt and pepper to taste

Instructions:
1. In a pan over medium heat, sauté the minced garlic until fragrant.
2. Add the cooked rice to the pan and stir well.
3. Pour in the heavy cream and stir again.
4. Let the sauce come to a simmer.
5. Cook for 5-10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the sauce has thickened and the rice has absorbed some of the cream.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Serve hot.

One tip: You can add some grated Parmesan cheese or chopped parsley to the dish for some extra flavour and texture.

Garlic Oat and Wheat Flour Crackers

Description: These homemade crackers are high in fiber and flavour. The combination of oats, wheat flour and garlic makes for a crunchy, savoury snack.

Ingredients:
- 1 cup of rolled oats
- 1 cup of wheat flour
- 2 cloves of minced garlic
- 1/2 teaspoon of salt
- 1/2 teaspoon of baking powder
- 1/4 cup of water
- 1/4 cup of olive oil

Instructions:
1. Preheat your oven to 350°F.
2. In a mixing bowl, combine the rolled oats, wheat flour, minced garlic, salt and baking powder.
3. Add the water and olive oil and stir well to form a dough.
4. Knead the dough on a floured surface for a few minutes until it becomes smooth.
5. Divide the dough into small portions and roll each one out into a thin sheet.
6. Cut each sheet into small squares or rectangles.
7. Place the crackers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
8. Bake for 15-20 minutes or until the crackers turn golden brown.
9. Remove from the oven and let them cool.

One tip: You can add some dried herbs like oregano, basil, or thyme to the dough for some extra flavour.

Garlic Oat and Milk Porridge

Description: This porridge is a comforting and healthy breakfast or snack. The oats and milk provide the perfect base for the garlic to infuse into, creating a flavourful and nourishing dish.

Ingredients:
- 1 cup of rolled oats
- 3 cloves of minced garlic
- 2 cups of milk
- Salt and pepper to taste

Instructions:
1. In a pot over medium heat, sauté the minced garlic until fragrant.
2. Add the rolled oats to the pot and stir well.
3. Pour in the milk and stir again.
4. Bring the mixture to a simmer.
5. Let it cook for 10-15 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the oats are tender and the mixture has thickened.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Serve hot.

One tip: You can add some grated cheese or a drizzle of honey to the porridge for some extra flavour. You can also add some chopped nuts or dried fruit as a topping for extra texture.

Garlic Oatmeal with Creamy Garlic Sauce

Description: This is not your average oatmeal! This savoury dish has a rich and creamy garlic sauce that takes oatmeal to a whole new level.

Ingredients:
- 1 cup of rolled oats
- 3 cloves of minced garlic
- 1/2 cup of heavy cream
- Salt and pepper to taste

Instructions:
1. In a pot over medium heat, sauté the minced garlic until fragrant.
2. Add the rolled oats to the pot and stir well.
3. Pour in 2 cups of water or broth, bring the oatmeal to a boil, and then reduce heat to a low simmer.
4. Stir frequently, and continue simmering for about 5-7 minutes, or until the oatmeal is cooked and creamy.
5. In a separate pan over medium heat, pour in the heavy cream and sauté the minced garlic until fragrant.
6. Pour the garlic sauce over the oatmeal and stir to combine.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Serve hot.

One tip: You can add some grated Parmesan cheese or chopped herbs like thyme or rosemary to the garlic sauce for some extra flavour.

Garlic Milk Gravy

Description: This is a simple and flavorful gravy that can be used to elevate any dish. The combination of garlic, wheat flour, and milk creates a rich and creamy sauce.

Ingredients:
- 3 cloves of minced garlic
- 2 tablespoons of wheat flour
- 2 cups of milk
- Salt and pepper to taste

Instructions:
1. In a pan over medium heat, sauté the minced garlic until fragrant.
2. Add the wheat flour to the pan and stir well. Cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly, until the flour has lightly browned.
3. Add the milk to the pan and whisk to combine.
4. Continue to whisk the mixture until the flour has dissolved and the sauce has thickened, about 5-7 minutes.
5. Remove from heat and season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Serve over your favourite dish.

One tip: You can add some shredded cheese to the milk gravy for a cheesy garlic sauce. Alternatively, you can add some dried herbs like thyme or basil for extra flavour.

Garlic Cream Sauce

Description: This delicious sauce is rich and creamy with a garlic flavor. It's versatile enough to be used with pasta, meat, fish or vegetables. 

Ingredients:
- 3 cloves of garlic, minced
- 2 tablespoons of wheat flour
- 1 cup of heavy cream
- 1/2 cup of water
- Salt and pepper to taste

Instructions:
1. In a pan over medium-high heat, sauté the minced garlic until fragrant.
2. Sprinkle wheat flour over the garlic and stir to combine.
3. Slowly pour heavy cream while stirring to avoid lumps. Mix until well combined.
4. Add water to thin out the mixture.
5. Let simmer until the sauce thickens, while stirring occasionally, for 5-7 minutes.
6. Remove from heat and season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Serve hot over pasta, meat, fish or vegetables.

One tip: You can add some grated Parmesan cheese to the garlic cream sauce for more depth of flavor. Optionally, you can add some chopped herbs like parsley or chives to garnish the dish.

Garlic Creamy Soup

Description: This garlic creamy soup is perfect for lunch or dinner and is sure to satisfy your cravings. It's velvety and rich with a garlic flavor.

Ingredients:
- 4 cloves of garlic, minced
- 1 cup of milk
- 1/2 cup of cream
- 1/2 cup of water
- Salt and pepper to taste

Instructions:
1. In a pot over medium heat, sauté the minced garlic until fragrant.
2. Add water and bring it to a boil. Let it simmer for 5 minutes.
3. Add milk and cream to the pot and stir until it mixes well.
4. Let the soup simmer for 10-15 minutes until the garlic is tender and the soup has thickened.
5. Remove from heat and allow it to cool.
6. Use an immersion blender to puree the soup, or alternatively, let the soup cool and blend it in a blender.
7. Return the pureed soup to the pot and reheat until hot.
8. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
9. Serve hot.

One tip: You can top the soup with some croutons or shredded cheese for an extra flavor and texture. Optionally, you can add some chili flakes to the soup to make it a little spicy.
which simple dish can I make with only onion,tomato,cucumber? and list out the description, ingredients, instructions and one tip

Tomato, Onion and Cucumber Salad

Description: This is a simple and refreshing salad that uses only a few fresh ingredients. It makes for a perfect side dish to any meal.

Ingredients:
- 2 medium-sized tomatoes, chopped
- 1 small onion, thinly sliced
- 1 small cucumber, chopped
- Salt and pepper to taste
- Olive oil and lemon juice for dressing

Instructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the tomatoes, onion, and cucumber.
2. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
3. Drizzle with olive oil and lemon juice for a refreshing dressing.
4. Toss the salad until the veggies are coated with the dressing.
5. Serve chilled.

One tip: You can add some fresh herbs like mint or coriander to the salad for extra flavor. You can also add some crumbled feta cheese or chopped avocado for more texture.
which simple dish can I make with only onion,tomato,spinach? and list out the description, ingredients, instructions and one tip

Tomato, Onion and Spinach Omelette

Description: This tasty omelette combines the sweetness of onion and the tanginess of tomato with the earthy flavor and nutrition of spinach for a delicious and healthy breakfast or lunch.

Ingredients:
- 2 large eggs
- 1 small onion, chopped
- 1 medium-sized tomato, chopped
- 1 cup packed spinach leaves, washed and chopped
- Salt and pepper to taste
- 1 tablespoon of olive oil

Instructions:
1. Crack the eggs into a bowl and beat with a fork until slightly frothy. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
2. In a pan over medium heat, sauté the chopped onion in olive oil until it becomes translucent.
3. Add the chopped tomato and spinach to the pan. Sprinkle with salt and pepper and cook until the spinach is wilted and the tomato has softened.
4. Pour the beaten eggs over the veggies in the pan.
5. Let the omelette cook for 2-3 minutes, or until the bottom part is set.
6. Flip the omelette over and cook for another minute on the other side.
7. Slide the omelette onto a plate and serve hot.

One tip: You can add some crumbled feta cheese or grated Parmesan cheese to the omelette for added flavor. Additionally, you can add some chopped herbs like oregano or basil to the veggies while sautéing for extra aroma and taste.
which simple dish can I make with only onion,tomato,rice? and list out the description, ingredients, instructions and one tip

Tomato and Onion Rice

Description: This simple rice recipe is a perfect side dish that is easy to make and full of flavor. The combination of onion and tomato is a classic one that you can never go wrong with.

Ingredients:
- 1 cup of rice
- 1 small onion, chopped
- 1 medium-sized tomato, chopped
- Salt and pepper to taste
- 1 1/2 cups of water
- 1 tablespoon of olive oil

Instructions:
1. Rinse the rice in cold water until the water becomes clear, then drain.
2. In a pan over medium heat, sauté the chopped onion in olive oil until it becomes translucent.
3. Add the chopped tomato to the pan and cook until it becomes soft and starts to break down.
4. Add the rice to the pan and stir until the rice is coated with the onions and tomato.
5. Pour the water into the pan. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and cover the pot.
7. Cook for 18-20 minutes or until the rice is tender and has absorbed all the water.
8. Remove the pot from the heat and let it sit for 5-10 minutes before fluffing the rice with a fork.
9. Serve hot.

One tip: You can add some chopped fresh herbs like parsley or cilantro to the rice for some extra flavor. You can also serve the rice with grilled or roasted chicken, fish or veggies.
which simple dish can I make with only onion,tomato,oats? and list out the description, ingredients, instructions and one tip

Tomato and Onion Oatmeal

Description: This is a savory oatmeal recipe that is a great alternative to sweet oatmeal. The combination of onion and tomato with the oats creates a flavorful and healthy dish.

Ingredients:
- 1/2 cup rolled oats
- 1 small onion, chopped
- 1 medium-sized tomato, chopped
- Salt and pepper to taste
- 1 1/2 cups of water
- 1 tablespoon of olive oil

Instructions:
1. In a pan over medium heat, sauté the chopped onion in olive oil until it becomes translucent.
2. Add the chopped tomato to the pan and cook until it becomes soft and starts to break down.
3. Add the rolled oats to the pan and stir until the oats are coated with the onions and tomato.
4. Pour the water into the pan, season with salt and pepper to taste, and stir everything together.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and cover the pot.
6. Cook for 5-7 minutes until the oats are tender and have absorbed the liquid.
7. Remove the pot from the heat and let it sit for a few minutes to thicken.
8. Serve hot.

One tip: You can add some grated Parmesan cheese or a drizzle of balsamic glaze to the oatmeal for some extra flavor. Alternatively, you can add some fresh herbs like thyme or rosemary to the oatmeal while cooking for added aroma and flavor.
which simple dish can I make with only onion,tomato,wheat flour? and list out the description, ingredients, instructions and one tip

Onion and Tomato Flatbread

Description: This is a delicious and easy-to-make savory flatbread that has a subtle sweetness from the caramelized onion and a little tang from the tomato.

Ingredients:
- 1 cup of wheat flour
- 1 small onion, sliced
- 1 medium-sized tomato, chopped
- Salt and pepper to taste
- 1/4 cup of water
- Olive oil for frying

Instructions:
1. In a pan over medium heat, sauté the sliced onion in olive oil until it becomes caramelized.
2. Add the chopped tomato to the pan and cook until it becomes soft and starts to break down.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine the wheat flour with salt and pepper.
4. Add the onion and tomato mixture to the bowl and mix everything together.
5. Gradually add water to the mixture and knead until a dough forms. 
6. Divide the dough into small portions and roll each one out into a flat disc.
7. Heat up a pan over medium heat and fry the flatbreads until golden brown on both sides.
8. Serve hot.

One tip: You can add some fresh herbs like basil or oregano to the flatbread dough for added flavor. You can also sprinkle some grated Parmesan cheese on top of the flatbreads right after they are cooked for extra flavor.
